response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with ~15 years of shipping production software across web, mobile, and embedded, plus recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands 8+ years specifically building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, and the candidate's AI experience is recent and brief (~6 months). There is no demonstrated Python, no vector database or RAG work, and limited cloud-AI system design beyond AWS CDK for pricing. Strong general engineering signal but a clear gap against the GenAI-specific and customer-facing staff requirements.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (~15 years) with strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD)
Recent direct exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Track record building and teaching (workshops, talks, open-source GIS platform) signaling technical leadership
concerns: Lacks 8+ years of production GenAI/AI-driven solution experience; AI work is recent and short
No demonstrated Python, vector databases, or RAG architecture experience
Limited cloud-native AI system design and no clear customer-facing forward-deployed delivery
